headline: Why Is Generac Holdings (GNRC) Up 7.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Generac Holdings (GNRC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 Overrated  Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: Exciting developments are taking place for the stocks in this article. They’ve all surged ahead of the broader market over the last month as catalysts such as new products and positive media coverage have propelled their returns.
